visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with her hair in a bun and a black cropped sweatshirt stands in a studio-like room with equipment in the background. She holds a pink product box and a small white sachet, smiling brightly at the camera. (2) In a split-screen comparison, the top shows the woman looking tired with a swirl emoji over her head labeled "Before," and the bottom shows her smiling radiantly with sparkles labeled "After." (3) Close-up shot of a pink TKLAB box showing product specifications including "Double" and "Collagen 6000mg." (4) The woman is shown in various settings: first sipping from a sachet while working at a desk, then in a kitchen area. (5) In an office/studio setting, the woman opens a box and hands out collagen sachets to three female colleagues sitting at desks with laptops and audio mixers. (6) The woman waves goodbye and dances excitedly as she walks toward a door, while her colleagues wave back, holding the pink sachets.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 沒想到效果這麼好. (2) [Subtitle]: 喝10天就感覺到氣色更好. (3) [Variety]: Before. After. (4) [Logo]: TKLAB. [Subtitle]: 2025全新兩倍升級的TKLAB特級膠原飲. (5) [Subtitle]: 含6000mg雙重膠原蛋白. (6) [Subtitle]: 我之前看到小S有在喝這個，就心動想要試試看. (7) [Subtitle]: 喝起來就像莓果果汁一樣，酸甜清爽. (8) [Variety]: 酸甜清爽. [Subtitle]: 就像莓果果汁一樣. (9) [Subtitle]: 哎我跟你講，你們忙碌工作之餘，也要好好照顧自己. (10) [Subtitle]: 一人一條，一人一條，一人一條. (11) [Subtitle]: 滿滿膠原蛋白，10天內呢，就讓你氣色好、狀態好. (12) [Variety]: 氣色好. 狀態好. (13) [Subtitle]: 持續喝60天的話，更能提升深層有感度. (14) [Variety]: 提升深層有感度. (15) [Subtitle]: 好好保養，以後大家直播都不用開美肌. (16) [Subtitle]: 好了我要下班了. [Subtitle]: 好累. [Subtitle]: 實習生下班. [Subtitle]: 拜拜拜拜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 female colleagues in the office background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair in a top bun, wearing a black cropped hoodie over a black tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio or office space equipped with lighting stands, a large audio mixing console, laptops, a white mug, and various storage bins.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced electronic pop BGM begins. A male narrator delivers a high-arousal, professional promotional script. A digital 'whoosh' SFX marks a visual transition. (2) A 'pop' sound effect occurs as a graphic bubble appears. The woman's voice is heard laughing and greeting colleagues in the background. (3) The male narrator continues, describing product benefits with clear articulation. (4) A 'ding' SFX highlights a feature mention. The woman's voice takes over, speaking in a friendly, high-pitched, excited tone about the taste. (5) Sound of group chatter and light laughter as sachets are shared. (6) Collective 'bye bye' from multiple female voices with high positive valence. A final upbeat musical stinger closes the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Problem/Comparison -> Product Introduction -> Usage Showcase -> Social Proof -> Departure
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote TKLAB's collagen drink by highlighting its aesthetic benefits (better skin tone), superior ingredients (6000mg collagen), pleasant berry flavor, and ease of sharing/use in a busy work environment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product, detailed mention of specifications (6000mg), brand logo placement, and explicit endorsement by the main character.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social-media-native editing style with frequent text overlays and SFX to maintain viewer engagement for an advertisement.
